ð¥ Interesting Fact: In the Night Garden... (Makka Pakka)

ð¬ Makka Pakka, one of the most loved characters from In the Night Garden..., is known for his habit of collecting and washing stones, which was designed to gently teach young children about routines, cleanliness, and care in a calm, comforting way through simple, repetitive actions.

Igglepiggle and his friends live in an enchanted forest that is rife with colourful and bright flowers. They engage in a lot of fun activities and listen to bedtime stories together.

â¨ð¬ In the Night Garden... is a British preschool children's television series created, written and composed by Teletubbies co-creator Andrew Davenport for CBeebies and BBC Two and produced by Ragdoll Worldwide, a joint venture of Ragdoll Productions and BBC Worldwide. The show was aimed at children aged from one to six years old. The programme is narrated by Derek Jacobi. It is filmed in live action and features a mix of actors in costume, stop motion, puppetry and CGI animation.

ðStoryline:
A toddler/infant adventure garden which tip-toes between the twilight state of a child being awake and moving through to a state of sleep. It is somewhat psychedelic, yet to a child it is fun, imaginative, colourful and, as the programme comes to a close, relaxing and sweet.

VIP (Velaiilla Pattadhari) is a 2014 Tamil action-comedy-drama film directed by Velraj and starring Dhanush and Amala Paul. The movie follows Raghuvaran (Raghu), a civil engineering graduate who remains unemployed for years because he refuses to take jobs unrelated to his field. Despite constant criticism from society and his father, he stays determined to achieve his dream. After a personal tragedy, Raghu gets an opportunity to prove his talent and faces powerful rivals in the construction industry. Through hard work, perseverance, and self-belief, he rises from being an unemployed graduate to a successful engineer.
